title: City council approves electric bus corridor
body: The city council approved a three-year rollout for electric buses on two major commuter corridors, with charging depots planned near central stations.

title: University team announces recyclable battery prototype
body: Researchers shared a lithium-sulfur battery design that can be disassembled and recycled with lower energy cost than current industrial methods.

title: Regional farms adopt drought-aware irrigation sensors
body: Cooperative farms reported water savings after deploying soil moisture sensors that automate irrigation timing based on crop stress thresholds.

title: Local startup opens low-cost telehealth kiosks
body: A health-tech startup launched telehealth kiosks in community centers, adding remote triage, basic diagnostics, and language support.

title: Data center shifts cooling to reclaimed water loop
body: Engineers completed a reclaimed-water cooling loop that reduces freshwater demand while keeping compute clusters within thermal limits.

title: Harbor district pilots autonomous cargo scheduling
body: Port operators began using predictive cargo scheduling to reduce wait times for trucks and improve berth utilization during peak windows.

title: Schools expand coding mentorship with local engineers
body: Public schools partnered with engineering volunteers to provide weekly coding mentorship and project showcases for middle-school students.

title: Hospital network deploys AI-assisted radiology triage
body: A hospital network deployed an AI-assisted queue for radiology studies, prioritizing urgent cases while preserving clinician review authority.

title: Rail operator adds weekend express service
body: Regional rail riders gained weekend express service between downtown and airport terminals, cutting average travel time by 18 minutes.

title: Open-source weather model improves storm lead time
body: An open-source weather model update improved short-range storm lead time in coastal zones according to independent forecast benchmarks.

title: City unveils neighborhood solar co-op rebates
body: A new rebate program supports neighborhood solar cooperatives by covering early engineering and permitting costs for shared rooftop systems.

title: Library launches public AI literacy workshops
body: Public libraries started AI literacy workshops focused on verification, bias awareness, and practical prompts for students and job seekers.
